title: The assessment tasks provided below uses a simulated business website named Career Training. To access the website, you …

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
The assessment tasks provided below uses a simulated business website named Career Training. To access the website, you need to log in by using the below-provided link:

http://careertraining.vetadvisorygroup.com/Links to an external site.

Username: CareertrainingRTO

Password: Career123

Career Training is acknowledged as an industry training leader delivering nationally recognised and specialised courses. Career Training is a private Registered Training Organisation (RTO) based in Geraldton, Western Australia, with satellite offices in Broome, Derby and Perth.

Registered Training Organisations (RTOs) are those training providers registered by ASQA (or, in some cases, a state regulator) to deliver vocational education and training (VET) services.

RTOs are recognised as providers of quality-assured and nationally recognised training and qualifications.

Only RTOs can:

Deliver nationally recognised courses and accredited Australian Qualifications Framework (AQF) VET qualifications,
Apply for Australian, state and territory funding to deliver vocational education and training.
RTOs can offer qualifications at the following levels:

Certificates I, II, III and IV
Diploma
Advanced Diploma
Vocational Graduate Certificate
Vocational Graduate Diploma.
YOUR TASK:

Career training is aware that Covid-19 impacts all businesses in every industry.

The organisation has planned to perform a risk management process to identify the risks associated with their organisation and treat those risks, accordingly.

The different risks the organisation will associate with the Covid 19 Risk Assessment is are highlighted in the following areas:

Staff shortage
Financial loss
Discrimination
Communication
You need to refer to the policies and procedures available on the Career Training website to complete the assessments as listed below:

Communication policies
Privacy and confidentiality policy and procedure
Harassment, grievance and complaints handling

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
policy and procedure

Assessment Task 1:

Based on the risk assessment, identify and explain the possible risks associated with Covid-19 on Career Training's staff shortage.

Assessment Task 2:

Based on the risk assessment, identify and explain the possible risks associated with Covid-19 on Career Training's financial loss.

Assessment Task 3:

Based on the risk assessment, identify and explain the possible risks associated with Covid-19 on Career Training's discrimination.

Assessment Task 4:

Based on the risk assessment, identify and explain the possible risks associated with Covid-19 on Career Training's communication.

Assessment Task 5:

Based on the policies and procedures available on the Career Training website, provide recommendations on how Career Training can mitigate the risks associated with Covid-19 on their staff shortage. 

Assessment Task 6:

Based on the policies and procedures available on the Career Training website, provide recommendations on how Career Training can mitigate the risks associated with Covid-19 on their financial loss.

Assessment Task 7:

Based on the policies and procedures available on the Career Training website, provide recommendations on how Career Training can mitigate the risks associated with Covid-19 on their discrimination.

Assessment Task 8:

Based on the policies and procedures available on the Career Training website, provide recommendations on how Career Training can mitigate the risks associated with Covid-19 on their communication. 

Assessment Task 9:

Create a communication plan for Career Training that will help mitigate the risks associated with Covid-19 on their staff members.

Assessment Task 10:

Create a risk mitigation plan for Career Training's financial loss due to Covid-19. Include at least three recommended actions to be taken by Career Training.

Assessment Task 11:

Create a harassment and discrimination prevention plan for Career Training's staff members in relation to Covid-19. 

Assessment Task 12:

Create a complaint handling process for Career Training's staff members in relation to Covid-19.

requirements, Staffing and Resource requirements: HR manager, Timeframe: 30 days; 2 .Objectives:New induction plan, Activities:Prepare new induction plan, Desired outcomes: All the staff will aware of important policies and roles and responsibilities,Staffing and Resource requirements: HR team, Timeframe: 15 days; 3.Objectives: Roles and responsibilities, Activities:Develop roles and responsibilities for each staff, Desired outcomes: Staff will get clear and accurate information related to roles and responsibilities 4. Objectives: Improve the staff retention, Activities: Collect feedback from staff and support them by providing right resources, Desired outcomes: Staff will feel appreciated and supported, Staffing and Resource requirements: CEO, HR Team, Timeframe:90 days

Given the risks identified above You are to review the operational plan and reprioritise the workflow.

To do you must review the following on the Career Training Website:

Mission
Vision
Resources available and Organisational structure/Chart
Associated policies and procedures
Use this template to complete this task: Company name:
1.Objective 2. Actions 3. Outcome 4. Resources 5. KPIs

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Company name: Career Training

Objective: Mitigate staff shortage risks associated with Covid-19
Actions: 
1. Review and modify HR policies related to Covid-19 staff shortage risks
2. Communicate revised policies to relevant staff
3. Develop and implement a work from home policy to reduce the risk of staff shortages 
Outcome: Clear HR policies that effectively mitigate the risk of staff shortages 
Resources: HR Manager, CEO, IT team
KPIs: 
1. Revised HR policies communicated and implemented within 30 days 
2. At least 80% staff awareness of revised policies 
3. Implementation of a work from home policy within 30 days 

Objective: Mitigate financial loss risks associated with Covid-19
Actions:
1. Review and modify financial policies to adapt to Covid-19 impacts 
2. Develop a financial contingency plan to mitigate the risk of financial loss
3. Identify and apply for available funding opportunities 
Outcome: Effective financial policies and contingency plan that mitigate the risk of financial loss 
Resources: CEO, Financial department 
KPIs: 
1. Revised financial policies communicated and implemented within 30 days 
2. Implementation of a financial contingency plan within 60 days 
3. Successful application for available funding opportunities 

Objective: Mitigate discrimination risks associated with Covid-19 
Actions: 
1. Review and modify policies related to discrimination in the workplace 
2. Develop a training program to educate staff on discrimination related to Covid-19 
3. Monitor compliance with the revised discrimination policies 
Outcome: Effective policies and training program that mitigate the risk of discrimination 
Resources: HR Manager, Workplace Health and Safety Manager 
KPIs: 
1. Revised discrimination policies communicated and implemented within 30 days 
2. At least 80% staff educational on discrimination related to Covid-19 
3. No reported instances of Covid-19 related discrimination 

Objective: Improve communication related to Covid-19 risks 
Actions: 
1. Develop and implement a regular communication plan related to Covid-19 risks 
2. Ensure all staff are aware of communication channels and resources available 
3. Monitor staff compliance with communication policies 
Outcome: Clear, consistent communication among staff related to Covid-19 risks 
Resources: HR Manager, Communication department 
KPIs: 
1. Communication plan developed and implemented within 30 days 
2. All staff aware of communication channels and resources available 
3. No reported instances of communication policy non-compliance 

Objective: Improve staff retention 
Actions: 
1. Gather feedback from staff on work conditions related to Covid-19 
2. Develop and implement strategies to support staff wellbeing 
3. Monitor staff morale and retention rates 
Outcome: Improved staff morale and retention rates during Covid-19 
Resources: CEO, HR Team 
KPIs: 
1. Gathering and analysing staff feedback within 15 days 
2. Implementation of wellbeing strategies within 30 days 
3. Improved staff retention rates over 90 days
